summary: Completed testing of Products API (72 new 2025/2026 products), i18n Kosovo (xk->sq) mapping, Login/Register pages with Google/Apple buttons, Last Chance, Reviews, Bundles, and Friend Battle pages. All backend tests passed (13/13). All frontend pages load correctly with proper German translations and data-testid attributes.

products_api.2025/2026 products: PASS - Found 13+ new products (iPhone 17, Galaxy S25, MacBook M4, Pixel 10, etc.)
products_api.No old products: PASS - No iPhone 15, Galaxy S24, etc. found
products_api.Product structure: PASS - All products have id, name, description, retail_price, image_url, category

i18n_kosovo.Language selector: PASS - Kosovo (🇽🇰) option available in dropdown
i18n_kosovo.xk->sq mapping: PASS - Selecting Kosovo shows Albanian translations
i18n_kosovo.Albanian text: PASS - Found 'Ankande', 'Oferta', 'Fitues' on page after selecting Kosovo

login_page.Login flow: PASS - Successfully logged in with kunde@bidblitz.de

register_page.Form inputs: PASS - Name, email, password inputs visible

last_chance_page.Title: PASS - Shows 'Letzte Chance'
last_chance_page.Time brackets: PASS - Shows 'Unter 1 Minute', 'Unter 5 Minuten', 'Unter 15 Minuten', 'Unter 1 Stunde'

reviews_page.Title: PASS - Shows 'Gewinner-Bewertungen'
reviews_page.Empty state: PASS - Shows 'Noch keine Bewertungen' when no reviews

bundles_page.Title: PASS - Shows 'Bieter-Bundles'
bundles_page.Bundle cards: PASS - Shows 4 bundles (Starter €29.99, Pro €69.99, Ultimate €149.99, VIP Jahresabo €299.99)

friend_battle_page.Title: PASS - Shows 'Freunde-Battle'
friend_battle_page.Stats cards: PASS - Shows Siege, Abgeschlossene Battles, Aktive Battles, Erhaltene Herausforderungen

critical_code_review_comments: Products API: Returns 72 products with proper structure, all 2025/2026 models
i18n: Kosovo (xk) correctly maps to Albanian (sq) via langMapping in translations.js
Login/Register: Both Google and Apple login buttons properly implemented with data-testid attributes
Apple Login: Shows info toast about needing Apple Developer Credentials (expected behavior)
All new feature pages (Last Chance, Reviews, Bundles, Friend Battle) working correctly
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_products_i18n.py - Created test suite for products and i18n features

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages and components working correctly

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. 72 products already in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Products API verified with 72 new 2025/2026 products (iPhone 17, Galaxy S25, MacBook M4, etc.). i18n Kosovo (xk) -> Albanian (sq) mapping working correctly. All new feature pages tested: /last-chance, /reviews, /bundles (auth required), /friend-battle (auth required). Login/Register pages have Google and Apple buttons with proper data-testid attributes. Apple login shows info toast about needing credentials (expected). All routes working correctly.
